mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_ID AS productId, CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, COMPANY_CODE AS companyCode, PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, PRODUCT_PRICE AS price, PRODUCT_STOCK AS stock, PRODUCT_DETAIL AS detail, PRODUCT_PHOTO1 AS photo1, PRODUCT_PHOTO2 AS photo2, PRODUCT_REG_DATE AS productRegDate, PRODUCT_ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, PET_TYPE AS petType, AGE_GROUP AS ageGroup FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_ID IN (1,2)
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ORDER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ORDERS ( ORDER_ID, MEMBER_NO, ORDER_DATE, ORDER_TOTAL_PRICE, ORDER_DELIVERY_FEE, ORDERER_NAME, ORDERER_PHONE, ORDERER_EMAIL, ORDER_MEMO, RECV_NAME, RECV_ADDRESS, RECV_PHONE ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{memberNo}, SYSDATE, #{orderTotalPrice}, #{orderDeliveryFee}, #{ordererName}, #{ordererPhone}, #{ordererEmail}, #{orderMemo}, #{recvName}, #{recvAddress}, #{recvPhone} )

SELECT SEQ_DETAIL.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ORDER_DETAIL ( DETAIL_ID, ORDER_ID, PRODUCT_ID, DETAIL_QTY, DETAIL_PRICE ) VALUES ( #{detailId}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{detailQty}, #{detailPrice} )

SELECT SEQ_DELIVERY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO DELIVERY ( DELIVERY_ID, ORDER_ID, COURIER, EXPECTED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{deliveryId}, #{orderId}, #{courier}, #{expectedDate} )
INSERT INTO STATUS ( DNUM, DELIVERY_YN, DELIVERY_STATUS, DELIVERY_ID ) VALUES ( #{dnum}, #{deliveryYn}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryId} )
